outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Pentagon war-gaming ground raids in Iran — Kharg Island, 82nd Airborne among options; Iran warns of 'heavy punishment' for US troops
outlets.summary: CNN reports Pentagon is preparing weeks-long ground operation plans including raids on Iran's main oil terminal, Kharg Island, and potential deployment of the 82nd Airborne. White House says no decision made.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Pentagon planning fuels Islamabad summit urgency — diplomats race to prevent ground war expansion
outlets.summary: NPR analysis: the WaPo Pentagon ground ops leak may have been intentional to pressure Iran into negotiations at the Islamabad quadrilateral summit.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: Pentagon prepares for weeks of US ground operations in Iran — including Kharg Island seizure
outlets.summary: WaPo exclusive: Pentagon war-gaming Kharg Island raids, Larak Island operations, and potential 82nd Airborne deployment to Iran.

outlets.name: NPR / NBC News
outlets.headline: Lebanon Toll Hits 1,189 — WHO: 9 Paramedics Killed in One Day as Anti-War Protests Grow in Israel
outlets.summary: NPR/NBC covering Lebanon death toll reaching 1,189 (47 in 24h), WHO documenting 9 paramedics killed in 5 separate strikes, and growing anti-war sentiment in Israel with 1,200 protesters in Tel Aviv (18 arrested). First time center-right Israelis joined anti-war demonstration. Three journalists killed in Jezzine now confirmed.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: IDF is 'days away' from completing all top-priority targets in Iran — now hitting nuclear, ballistic missile, command sites
outlets.summary: IDF Spokesperson Nadav Shoshani tells Fox that Israel is 'days away from finishing the job against top-priority targets.' US-Israel coordination described as 'shoulder-to-shoulder.'

outlets.name: Wall Street Journal
outlets.headline: E-3 AWACS confirmed destroyed at Prince Sultan — US strategic aircraft loss highest since Cold War
outlets.summary: WSJ reports imagery confirmation of total E-3G AWACS loss at Saudi base. First US strategic aircraft destroyed in combat since the Cold War.

outlets.name: NY Post
outlets.headline: Iran Kills 12 US Troops at Saudi Base — Wave 84 Destroys AWACS; Houthis Open 5th Front
outlets.summary: NY Post covers IRGC Wave 84 strike on Prince Sultan Air Base wounding 12 Americans (2 critically), damaging an E-3 AWACS and refueling aircraft. Separately, Houthi militants fired their first ballistic missile at Israel from Yemen, opening a fifth front in the war.

outlets.name: Daily Caller
outlets.headline: Iran Using Cluster Munitions Against Israel as US Warns of Critical Interceptor Shortfall
outlets.summary: Daily Caller focuses on Iran's third confirmed use of cluster munitions against Israeli population centers (after Ramat Gan and Kafr Qasim), alongside RUSI think-tank warning that Arrow 2/3 and THAAD interceptor stocks are at critical lows after 29 days of sustained operations.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Day 30: Pentagon readies ground ops in Iran; IRGC hits Bahrain and UAE aluminium plants; Islamabad summit opens
outlets.summary: Al Jazeera Day 30 comprehensive coverage: Pentagon Kharg Island ground ops planning, IRGC strikes Gulf aluminium plants, Islamabad quadrilateral summit, Guterres demands end to war.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Guterres at EU Council: 'It is high time to end this war — it risks getting completely out of control'
outlets.summary: UN Secretary-General makes his most direct appeal to all sides, calling on US/Israel to end the war and Iran to stop attacking its neighbors.

outlets.name: BBC
outlets.headline: Israel Kills Al-Manar, Al-Mayadeen Reporters in Lebanon — G7 Calls for Hormuz Reopening
outlets.summary: BBC covers the killing of two journalists in south Lebanon by Israeli strikes, and the G7 joint communiqué demanding Iran reopen the Strait of Hormuz without conditions. G7 foreign ministers meeting in Fiuggi, France condemned attacks on civilian infrastructure and called for humanitarian access.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: Islamabad Summit: Saudi, Turkish, Egyptian Diplomats Press Iran Peace Deal as Oil Holds at $112
outlets.summary: Reuters reports Saudi FM Faisal bin Farhan, Turkish FM Hakan Fidan, and Egyptian FM Badr Abdelatty all physically arrived in Islamabad for emergency Iran peace mediation. Brent crude holding at $112.57/bbl. Iran submitted a 5-point counter-proposal to the US 15-point ceasefire framework through Pakistani intermediaries.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF: Days away from completing all top-priority Iran targets; Sgt. Katz (22, New Haven) killed in Lebanon
outlets.summary: Times of Israel Day 30 coverage: IDF spokesman says operation nearing completion on primary targets; lone soldier killed in south Lebanon; IRGC aluminium attacks; anti-war protests 21 arrested.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: Netanyahu pushes for ground component in Iran; anti-war protests spread; E-3 AWACS confirmed destroyed
outlets.summary: Haaretz reports Netanyahu privately supporting ground operations in Iran while Vance publicly says war is nearly done. 21 arrested at anti-war protests.

outlets.name: Haaretz
outlets.headline: IDF Strikes Kill Three Journalists in Lebanon — Al Manar Correspondent, Al Mayadeen Reporter, and Brother Dead
outlets.summary: Times of Israel reporting with IDF statement that Ali Shoeib was a Hezbollah Radwan Force operative 'acting as journalist.' CPJ condemned the strike. Three confirmed dead: Shoeib (30-year Al Manar veteran), Fatima Ftouni (Al Mayadeen), Mohammed Ftouni (freelance). Lebanese President Aoun called it a violation of international law.

outlets.name: Ynet
outlets.headline: IDF: 8,500 Iran Targets Struck — Now Hitting Arms Factories at Maximum Pace Before Possible Ceasefire
outlets.summary: Ynet reports IDF has struck 8,500+ targets in Iran total, including 400 ballistic missiles and 335 missile launchers. An Israeli source told NPR that IDF is 'speeding up targeting in Iran over the next 48 hours, focusing on arms factories' before any ceasefire could be declared — Israel fears a premature deal below its objectives.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Ghalibaf: 'Iranian forces ready to fire and punish any US soldiers who step foot on Iranian soil'
outlets.summary: Iranian Parliament Speaker warns US against ground operations in Iran, responding to WaPo Pentagon planning report. Iran claims to have full intelligence on US preparations.

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: IRGC: Combined strikes on Bahrain and UAE aluminium plants 'linked to US military-aerospace complex'
outlets.summary: IRNA reports IRGC claiming responsibility for coordinated strikes on two Gulf aluminium mega-plants, framing them as legitimate military targets due to their role in US defense supply chains.

outlets.name: Tehran Times
outlets.headline: Iran's 5-Point Peace Plan Submitted to Islamabad — Sovereignty, Reparations, Guarantees Required
outlets.summary: Tehran Times reports Iran formally submitted a 5-point counter-proposal to US demands through Pakistani intermediaries: (1) halt all aggression, (2) mechanisms to prevent resumption, (3) reparations for war damages, (4) end attacks on Hezbollah and Iraqi militias, and (5) international recognition of Iran's Hormuz rights. Iran called the US 15-point plan 'maximalist and one-sided.'

outlets.name: IRNA
outlets.headline: IRGC: Operation True Promise 4 Continues — Wave 84 Strikes US Refueling Fleet at Al-Kharj
outlets.summary: IRNA state news reports IRGC's Wave 84 successfully struck US aerial refueling aircraft at Prince Sultan Air Base (Al-Kharj), claiming destruction of refueling capacity. IRGC Aerospace Force-Navy joint operation used both solid and liquid-fuel ballistic missiles. IRGC says 'Operation True Promise 4' continues until all objectives are achieved.
